name: Pasta with Garlic and Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the dry pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Heat the olive oil in a small frying pan over medium heat.
3. Add the minced garlic to the pan and sauté for just a moment, until fragrant.
4. Drain the cooked pasta and toss it with the garlic-infused oil mixture.
5. Grate the Parmesan cheese over the pasta and mix well.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
